# symbiote-workspace

> Toolkit for turning chat intent into portable, executable Symbiote workspaces. Node-safe core, browser mounting, CLI, and MCP share one dispatch layer.

symbiote-workspace is the construction and orchestration package between Symbiote UI primitives and host products. It plans workspace layouts from user intent, selects modules by capability metadata, validates portable JSON configs, applies Cascade themes, exports strict host-neutral packages, and exposes the same tools through JavaScript imports, CLI commands, and MCP JSON-RPC.

## Key resources

- [README](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/blob/main/README.md): package overview, quick start, visual demo, docs, and related projects
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release history and current unreleased changes
- [Realtime builder demo](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/tree/main/examples/visual-demo): browser demo for chat-state workspace construction, atomic mounted updates, layouts, modules, and Cascade theme transitions

## Core docs

- [Architecture and Entry Points](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): package layers, dispatch architecture, import boundaries, and root entry points
- [Getting Started and Preview](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/blob/main/docs/getting-started.md): programmatic setup, CLI aliases, generated browser previews, and visual demo commands
- [Host Contracts and Construction Protocol](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/blob/main/docs/host-contracts.md): strict export/import, MCP tools, workspace config, construction planning, and theme mounting
- [Plugins, Portability, and Templates](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/blob/main/docs/plugins-and-templates.md): plugin format, module capabilities, portability rules, templates, and workspace packages
- [Visual demo guide](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/blob/main/examples/visual-demo/README.md): browser smoke options and CI-friendly write-only mode

## Runtime surfaces

- [`symbiote-workspace`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/blob/main/index.js): Node-safe schema, loader, constructor, sharing, validation, plugins, runtime, and handlers
- [`symbiote-workspace/browser`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/blob/main/browser.js): browser mounting, theme application, mounted updates, and browser-safe isomorphic APIs
- [`symbiote-workspace/runtime`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/tree/main/runtime): unified dispatch registry, session state, and tool metadata
- [`symbiote-workspace/mcp`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/tree/main/mcp): MCP JSON-RPC stdio transport; thin proxy to dispatch
- [`symbiote-workspace/cli`](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/blob/main/cli.js): command-line entrypoint for construction, validation, preview, workflow kanban, and MCP mode

## Construction concepts

- [Constructor](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/tree/main/constructor): intent normalization, template matching, construction questions, topology planning, module capability selection, and package context handoff
- [Schema](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/tree/main/schema): workspace config schema, module capability schema, and validation helpers
- [Handlers](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/tree/main/handlers): config mutation tools for layouts, panels, groups, sections, widgets, events, behaviors, preview, workflow kanban, and scaffolding
- [Sharing](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/tree/main/sharing): strict export/import portability, browser import-map contract, workspace packages, package inspection, and construction context projection
- [Validation](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/tree/main/validation): design guardrails and workspace patch validation
- [Plugins](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/tree/main/plugins): plugin schema, registry, module capability collection, and workspace template inputs

## Agent and host guidance

- Use `planWorkspaceConstruction()` or the `plan_workspace` dispatch tool to turn intent into a portable construction plan.
- Use plugin/module capability descriptors before creating new custom modules.
- Use `exportConfig(..., { strict: true })` and `importConfig()` for share/relaunch flows; strict mode rejects auth, user identity, server URLs, local paths, and host-only runtime state.
- Use `mountWorkspace().updateConfig()` or `mountWorkspace().applyPatch()` for no-reload browser updates instead of replacing the app shell.
- Use `workflow_kanban` for portable workflow-board panels backed by provider-owned Symbiote UI board components.

## Release and package proof

- [release-preflight.js](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/blob/main/scripts/release-preflight.js): non-publishing stable-release gate for metadata, tests, package contents, npm registry/auth, browser demo proof, and clean git state
- [package-consumer tests](https://github.com/rnd-pro/symbiote-workspace/blob/main/tests/package-consumer.test.js): installed-package proof for exports, CLI/MCP surfaces, docs, and packed file hygiene
